name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants can be in states: Init, Prepared, Committed, Aborted *)
Init == /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> Init]
       /\ coordinator = Init
       /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator can be in states: Init, Waiting, Committing, Aborting *)
Next ==
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
     /\ coordinator = Init
     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [msg \in {Prepare}])
     /\ coordinator' = Waiting
  \/ (* Coordinator receives VoteYes from a participant *)
     /\ coordinator = Waiting
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ messages = Append(messages, [msg \in {VoteYes}])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Committed]
  \/ (* Coordinator receives VoteNo from a participant *)
     /\ coordinator = Waiting
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ messages = Append(messages, [msg \in {VoteNo}])
        /\ coordinator' = Aborting
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Commit to all participants *)
     /\ coordinator = Committing
     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [msg \in {Commit}])
     /\ coordinator' = Init
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Abort to all participants *)
     /\ coordinator = Aborting
     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [msg \in {Abort}])
     /\ coordinator' = Init
  \/ (* Participants receive Prepare and vote Yes *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[i] = Init
        /\ messages = Append(messages, [msg \in {Prepare}])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Prepared]
  \/ (* Participants receive Commit and commit *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[i] = Prepared
        /\ messages = Append(messages, [msg \in {Commit}])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Committed]
  \/ (* Participants receive Abort and abort *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[i] = Prepared
        /\ messages = Append(messages, [msg \in {Abort}])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Aborted]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "thinking" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"] /\ forks' = forks)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = (i % N) + 1
                           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![(i % N) + 1] = i]
                           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"])
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "eating" /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![(i % N) + 1] = (i % N) + 1]
                           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==
